creator: schlesix@gmx.de
text:
The devel/subversion (1.5.4_2) port runs into an error while installation:

[..]
===>  Installing for subversion-1.5.4_2
===>   subversion-1.5.4_2 depends on shared library: neon.28 - found
===>   subversion-1.5.4_2 depends on shared library: apr-1.3 - found
===>   subversion-1.5.4_2 depends on shared library: intl - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if devel/subversion already installed
subversion/svnversion/svnversion . /repos/svn/trunk > /usr/local/include/subversion-1/svn-revision.txt
cannot create /usr/local/include/subversion-1/svn-revision.txt: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2
[..]

How-To-Repeat: Build the devel/subversion port
